title: LOW-INCOME HOUSING ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - 211info
text: WASHINGTON COUNTY DEPARTMENT OF HOUSING SERVICES LOW-INCOME HOUSING ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers housing options such as Section 8 Housing Choice Vouchers, Project-Based Vouchers, and Public Housing. 161 NW Adams Avenue Suite 2000 Hillsboro, OR 97124 Eligibility: Varies by program. Voucher programs serve households with income at or below the HUD Very Low Income limit (50% of area Median Family Income). Public Housing serves households with income at or below the HUD Low Income limit (80% of area Median Family Income). Hours: Not applicable Email (503) 846-4794 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 846-4794 Main phone Main phone (503) 846-4794 FAX (503) 846-4795 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for more information and to check if the waitlist is open FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Photo ID, proof of income LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Washington County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Lobby is located on the 2nd floor. Services: Public Housing Section 8 Housing Choice Vouchers Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - AFFORDABLE HOUSING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WASHINGTON COUNTY DEPARTMENT OF HOUSING SERVICES
